name: Light Dims
description: Stage lighting fading to darkness with warm glow

prompts.label: stage lighting fading to warm darkness with gentle dimming glow
prompts.text: stage lighting fading to warm darkness with gentle dimming glow, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: incandescent bulb filament cooling from bright to dark
prompts.text: incandescent bulb filament cooling from bright to dark, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: theater lights transitioning through amber to blackout
prompts.text: theater lights transitioning through amber to blackout, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: neon sign flickering off with gas tube discharge fade
prompts.text: neon sign flickering off with gas tube discharge fade, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: room illumination descending through twilight to shadow
